The emitted chart reflects this price spread over the most recent 20 trades, capturing a period of active trading where the largest individual buy was recorded at $58,799.99.

| **Small** | +$366.69 | Bullish |
| **Medium** | +$492.36 | Bull|sh |
| **Whale** | +$133,860.01 | Bullish |
